metadata.title: High-Up Labs — Commission-Based Performance Marketing
metadata.description: Romania's first commission-only performance marketing agency. 5-10% of sales from ads. Zero retainer. 90-day guarantee. Pitești, Romania.

footer.madeIn: Made in Pitești, for entrepreneurs who want to grow without burning cash.

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.description: We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytics cookies to understand how you use it. You can choose what to accept.

hero.description: Performance marketing for online stores. You pay 5-10% of sales from ads. No monthly retainer. No long-term contract. Accounts stay in your name.

manifesto.label: [01] MANIFESTO
manifesto.text: Six years in digital marketing. I've seen too closely how the industry works. Agencies collecting thousands of euros per month and delivering pretty reports with zero sales. Founders burning tens of thousands and ending up with empty pockets. Ad accounts held hostage under the agency's name so you can't leave. Autumn 2025 I opened High-Up Labs. No retainer. No bullshit. 5-10% commission from sales generated by ads. Accounts are in your name, you're admin, you own the data. 90 days to hit the profit target. If we miss, month four is on us. Written black on white in the contract. Not a marketing promise. Simple math.

pillars.title: Total Transparency
pillars.desc: Your accounts. Your pixel. Your data. We only have access while we work together.

pillars.title: Real Alignment
pillars.desc: We only win when you win. No sales? No invoice. Zero risk, zero excuses.

pillars.title: Accountability
pillars.desc: Miss the target in 90 days? Month four is on us. Written black on white in the contract.

rows.us: 5-10% of sales generated by ads. Zero retainer. You only pay when we sell.
rows.them: Fixed retainer 1,500–5,000 EUR per month. You pay even when sales are zero. Even when campaigns lose money.

rows.us: Business Manager, ad accounts, pixel — all in your name. You own the data. Leave whenever you want, with full history.
rows.them: Accounts under agency name. You lose pixel, audiences and history when leaving. Rebuilding costs thousands of euros and months.

rows.us: Weekly. POAS, ROAS, AOV, CPA, cost per acquisition. Numbers that matter, not reach and impressions.
rows.them: Reach, impressions, engagement, "brand awareness". Monthly Canva report with pretty colors and zero substance.

rows.us: No minimum term. 30 days notice. No exit penalties.
rows.them: 6–12 months locked in. Exit penalties. They've got you in their claws and won't let you breathe.

rows.us: 90 days. If we don't hit the agreed target, month 4 is free. Written black on white in the contract.
rows.them: No guarantee. "We'll optimize more", "the algorithm is learning", "you need to wait". Translation: they have no clue what they're doing.

rows.us: Video scripts, briefs, photos, carousels, banners. We make them. You film with your phone.
rows.them: "We don't have a creative budget." Or they give you Shutterstock photos. Or say "organic content is your responsibility."

rows.us: We analyze store, product and margin first. If you're not ready, we say no to your face.
rows.them: Anyone with a valid card can sign. Then they blame the client, the market, the season, anything.

valueStack.label: [03] OFFER
valueStack.title: WHAT YOU GET
includes: Complete creatives: photos, carousels, banners and formats adapted for Meta Ads, Google Ads and TikTok Ads
Campaign setup and management from scratch, on all platforms relevant for e-commerce
Correct tracking: audit, installation and testing of Meta pixel, GA4, TikTok, Google Ads — we verify every conversion is recorded
Video scripts and creative briefs: we write the scenario and give direction, you film with your phone
Weekly reporting with POAS, ROAS, AOV, CPA. Real metrics showing profit, not vanity numbers.
Full data access. Your accounts, you're admin. Zero opacity, zero excuses.
excludes: Professional video filming: we don't come with cameramen, lights or studio. Filming is your job, with your phone.
Organic social media: posts, stories, comment replies, community management. We don't do this and don't pretend we do.
Product or offer redesign: we tell you directly if product or offer is problematic, but we don't fix what isn't about ads.

calculator.label: [04] CALCULATOR
calculator.title: HOW MUCH STAYS IN ACCOUNT AFTER ADS AND COMMISSION
calculator.description: POAS = Profit Over Ad Spend. Unlike ROAS, which just divides revenue by ad budget, POAS shows you real profit left after paying for ads and our commission. ROAS of 4x with 10% margin can mean loss. POAS of 1.5x with 40% margin means real money in the bank.
calculator.disclaimer: Calculation is simplified. Does not include fixed costs, salaries, profit tax or returns. Purpose is to show order of magnitude. POAS matters more than ROAS because it measures real profit left in account, not just generated revenue.

cases.title: Electric scooters Sibiu: 37,062 RON invested, 2,161,742 RON sales in 60 days.
cases.excerpt: Google Ads PMax + Meta Ads. 1,043 conversions. Client had worked 8 months with another agency — they reported ROAS 3x, but the card was bleeding. We took the same budget and pulled 2.16 million.

cases.title: Travel agency Argeș: 1,700,657 lei in 12 months, starting from digital zero.
cases.excerpt: SmartBill + Meta CAPI + landing pages. From zero online to 993 invoices in first year. 85% of customers return. Average daily revenue in Q1 2026: 4,436 lei.

articles.title: 11 signs the agency you're about to sign with will leave you broke
Why a 1,500 euro retainer eats your business worse than you think
If the product sucks, no agency in the world can save you

qualify.label: [07] CHECK
qualify.title: READY?
questions: Do you have at least 2,000 EUR/month ad budget?
Is your net product margin above 15%?
Do you have working tracking (Pixel, GA4) or are you willing to set it up?
Can you process 3x more orders without breaking operationally?
Do you have validated sales (we don't test products that haven't sold)?

perfect.title: YES.
perfect.desc: Your business is ready for scaling.

good.title: ALMOST.
good.desc: You have a few things to fix.

ctaFinal.ticker: YOU PAY WHEN YOU SELL. WE SCALE PROFIT, NOT RETAINER.
ctaFinal.description: 30 minutes on your numbers, no obligation. We show you what works, what doesn't, and if it makes sense to work together. If not, we tell you directly. No aggressive follow-up. No "when do we sign".
ctaFinal.footer: No pressure. No hard selling. If it's no, it stays no.

story.p1: We're in Pitești. Six years in marketing. I've watched agencies collect thousands of euros every month. Whether the client sold anything or not. I saw Canva reports. Organic reach. Impressions. I saw founders burn tens of thousands. And end up with zero. Autumn 2025 I opened High-Up Labs. Different model.
story.p2: You only pay us when you sell. 5-10% commission from sales that ads bring. Zero retainer. Zero hidden costs. Your Meta, Google and TikTok accounts stay in your name. You're the admin. We only have access while we work. If we don't hit the agreed POAS target in 90 days, month four is free. Not marketing fluff. Simple math.
story.p3: Six active clients right now. Among them: an electric scooter store in Sibiu — 2.16 million RON in 60 days. A travel agency in Argeș — 1.7 million lei in 12 months, starting from digital zero.

items.title: Why commission-only?
items.desc: I checked 22 agencies in Romania. All on retainer. None offer pure performance marketing on sales commission. Big agencies can't adopt this model. They have massive fixed costs. Bucharest rent. 30+ employees. We, from Pitești, with low costs, do what they can't. We trade revenue predictability for absolute differentiation.

items.title: Why 90-day guarantee?
items.desc: Because the Romanian entrepreneur is traumatized by instability. Not cheap. Burned. 40.7% of micro-enterprises are losing money. 83,012 companies dissolved in 2024. Every leu spent could have gone to salaries, stock, or survival. The retainer model is deeply unfair. You pay the same whether you hit record revenue or end up in the red. We take the risk with you.

items.title: Why your accounts?
items.desc: I've seen this scenario too many times. The agency holds your accounts hostage. Want to leave? They give you access slowly. Or not at all. The data is yours. The pixel is yours. The audiences are yours. When we stop working together, you keep everything we built. Not a folder of Canva reports.

items.title: Honesty
items.desc: We tell you when it's the business's fault. Ads don't fix a weak product, a bad price, or a site that doesn't convert. If you're not ready, we say so on the first call.

items.title: Transparency
items.desc: Accounts remain yours. Meta, Google, TikTok, GA4 — all in your name, you admin. Access only while we work. We report POAS, ROAS, AOV, CPA. Zero made-up metrics.

items.title: Alignment
items.desc: We only win if you win. 5-10% commission on what we sell through ads. Zero retainer. Zero hidden costs. You don't sell? We don't invoice. Simple.

items.title: Accountability
items.desc: Month 4 is on us if we miss. We set a concrete POAS target in the first call. We don't hit it in 90 days? You pay nothing. Written in the contract. Not promised on a call.

sections.title: About us
sections.content: High-Up Labs is a performance marketing agency operated by STEFAN SERBAN INVESTITII IMOBILIARE SRL, VAT RO49663952, headquartered in Pitesti, Arges. Complete legal identification details appear in this document and in the signed contract between parties. The agency opened in autumn 2025.

sections.title: Scope of services
sections.content: Our services include paid campaign management (Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads), tracking audit, creative generation (images and video scripts), and periodic reporting (POAS, ROAS, AOV, CPA). We do not include video filming, organic social media management, or product redevelopment. Specific details are defined in each individual contract.

sections.title: Commission
sections.content: Our model is commission-only: 5-10% of sales directly generated by ads. The exact percentage, calculation period, and billing method are established contractually. We do not charge retainer, setup fee, or any hidden costs. Minimum: 2,000 EUR monthly ad budget or 15% confirmed net margin.

sections.title: 90-day guarantee
sections.content: If within the first 90 days of collaboration we don't reach the initially agreed POAS target, month 4 is free. This clause applies only if the client's business, product, stock, and tracking are functional and accepted by us at the start of the collaboration.

sections.title: Client accounts
sections.content: All ad accounts, tracking pixels, and associated data are opened in the client's name and remain the client's property. The client is the primary administrator. High-Up Labs has access rights only during the collaboration and only to accounts contractually delegated. Upon termination, our access is revoked immediately.

sections.title: Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate the collaboration with 30 days written notice. The client may also terminate without notice if contractual clauses are breached. Upon termination, all accounts and data remain with the client. Commission is calculated pro-rata until the termination date.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.content: Generated creatives (images, video scripts, ad copy) remain the client's property after payment of the relevant commission. Strategy materials and internal documents remain the property of High-Up Labs.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
sections.content: High-Up Labs does not guarantee specific sales volumes. Results depend on the quality of the client's product, offer, pricing, and stock. High-Up Labs' total financial liability is limited to the commission amount collected in the last 3 months from when the issue arose.

sections.title: Modifications
sections.content: These terms may be updated periodically. Significant changes will be notified to active clients by email at least 15 days before taking effect.

sections.title: Applicable law
sections.content: Contracts and disputes are governed by Romanian law. The competent jurisdiction is the Pitesti Court.

sections.title: Data controller
sections.content: High-Up Labs (STEFAN SERBAN INVESTITII IMOBILIARE SRL, VAT RO49663952, Pitesti, Arges) is the controller of personal data collected through this site and contact forms, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).

sections.title: What data we collect
sections.content: Through the application form we collect: name, email address, phone number, website, and business data (monthly sales, ad budget, net margin, tracking platform). Through browsing we automatically collect: IP address, browser type, pages visited, visit duration, and interactions (via cookies, pixels, and analytics).

sections.title: Why we collect it
sections.content: To respond to your application, evaluate compatibility, personalize the offer, optimize advertising campaigns, measure site performance, and communicate periodically. We do not use data for purposes other than those declared.

sections.title: Legal basis
sections.content: Processing is based on: (a) contract execution or pre-contractual measures (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR), (b) explicit consent for marketing (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR), and (c) legitimate interests for security and optimization (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

sections.title: Who we share data with
sections.content: With contractual processors: Vercel (hosting), Resend (email), Google Analytics (analytics), Meta Platforms (advertising). All are located in the US or EU and provide GDPR guarantees (standard contractual clauses). We do not sell or give your data to other third parties for direct marketing.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure ("right to be forgotten"), portability, objection, and restriction of processing. To exercise your rights, send a request to business@highuplabs.ro. We respond within 30 calendar days. You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Romanian DPA (ANSPDCP).

sections.title: Data retention
sections.content: Unanswered applications are kept for 24 months, then automatically deleted. If we sign a contract, data is kept according to Romanian tax legislation (10 years for accounting documents). Browsing data is kept for 26 months in Google Analytics.

sections.title: Security
sections.content: Data is stored on encrypted servers (TLS 1.3). Transfer is exclusively via HTTPS. Internal access is strictly limited to authorized persons. We do not store passwords or card data.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: We use essential cookies (site functionality, language preferences), analytics cookies (Google Analytics 4), and marketing cookies (Meta Pixel for remarketing and conversions). Full details on the Cookie page.

sections.title: DPO contact
sections.content: For any questions regarding personal data, contact us at business@highuplabs.ro or at our address in Pitesti, Arges.

whatAre.title: What are cookies
whatAre.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a site. They help us provide a functional experience, analyze traffic, and measure advertising campaign performance. You can refuse non-essential cookies via the banner or browser settings.

essential.label: [ESSENTIAL]
essential.content: Necessary for the basic functioning of the site. Cannot be disabled. Include: language preference (ro/en), browsing session, security (CSRF, HTTPS). Without them, the site does not work properly.

analytics.label: [ANALYTICS]
analytics.content: Help us understand how you use the site and improve it. Include: Google Analytics 4 (traffic measurement, visit duration, pages visited, events). Data is anonymized. Without them, we don't know which pages work and which don't.

marketing.label: [MARKETING]
marketing.content: Used for remarketing and measuring conversions from ads. Include: Meta Pixel (Facebook/Instagram) — conversion tracking, custom audiences, ad delivery optimization. These cookies require explicit consent under GDPR.

manage.title: How to manage cookies
manage.content: You can manage preferences anytime via the cookie banner at the bottom of the site. You can also disable cookies directly in your browser: Chrome (Settings > Privacy), Safari (Preferences > Privacy), Firefox (Settings > Privacy). Note: disabling analytics and marketing cookies does not affect site functionality, but prevents us from measuring performance.

articles.label: [ARCHIVE]
articles.title: ARTICLES
articles.subtitle: The best way to not get scammed by an agency is to know what they do. No jargon. No corporate speak.
articles.ctaText: Want a free audit on your business? 30 minutes, no obligation.

cases.label: [PROOF]
cases.title: CASE STUDIES
cases.subtitle: Real numbers. Including what we did right and what we messed up. No photoshopped charts.
